The observable report-only behavior is supported by PR body terminal proof plus source and test inspection.

target.title: feat(dreaming): add report-only shadow trial runner
target.body: ## Summary¥n¥nAdds a small report-only shadow trial runner for dreaming candidates.¥n¥nThe runner takes the same pieces covered by the QA scenario: candidate memory, trial prompt, baseline outcome, candidate outcome, verdict, reason, risk flags, and evidence refs. It returns a stable markdown report and can write that report under `memory/dreaming/shadow-trials/`.¥n¥nThis keeps the work on the path started in #83297: useful shadow-trial output first, still no durable memory mutation.¥n¥n## Real behavior proof¥n¥nBehavior or issue addressed: The new dreaming shadow-trial runner should write a report artifact for a candidate memory while leaving durable memory untouched. A `helpful` verdict may recommend `promote` in the report, but the action must still be report-only.¥n¥nReal environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, running the repo source through Node with the project's `tsx` loader. The proof used a temporary workspace containing a real `MEMORY.md` file on disk.¥n¥nExact steps or command run after this patch:¥n```bash¥nnode --import tsx --input-type=module¥n```¥n¥nEvidence after fix: Terminal output from the local OpenClaw checkout:¥n¥n```json¥n{¥n  ¥

: true¥n}¥n```¥n¥nObserved result after fix: The runner wrote `memory/dreaming/shadow-trials/2026-05-18.md`, returned `recommendation: promote`, kept `promotionAction: report-only`, and the existing `MEMORY.md` content was read back unchanged.¥n¥nWhat was not tested: I did not wire this into the deep-phase scoring loop or automatic promotion path; that is intentionally left for a separate follow-up.¥n¥n## Real behavior details¥n¥nThe report contract is explicit:¥n¥n- `candidate`¥n- `trial prompt`¥n- `baseline outcome`¥n- `candidate outcome`¥n- `verdict`¥n- `recommendation`¥n- `reason`¥n- `risk flags`¥n- `evidence refs`¥n- `promotion action: report-only`¥n¥nVerdicts map to advisory recommendations only:¥n¥n- `helpful` -> `promote`¥n- `neutral` -> `defer`¥n- `harmful` -> `reject`¥n¥n## Tests¥n¥n- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-memory.config.ts`¥n  - 82 files passed, 849 tests passed¥n- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`¥n- `pnpm tsgo:test:extensions`¥n- `pnpm format:docs:check`¥n- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`¥n- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-shadow-trial.ts extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-shadow-trial.test.ts extensions/memory-core/api.ts`¥n- `OPENCLAW_ENABLE_PRIVATE_QA_CLI=1 node scripts/run-node.mjs qa suite --provider-mode mock-openai --scenario dreaming-shadow-trial-report --concurrency 1`¥n  - 1 passed, 0 failed¥n  - report: `.artifacts/qa-e2e/suite-mpbitv14/qa-suite-report.md`¥n¥nIf this lands, the scoring integration should stay as a separate follow-up so this PR remains report-only.
